caption:
From AED 49 per person, you’ll get to enjoy unlimited breakfast at @lavashdubai!

Here are the all-you-can-eat packages available
(No drinks included. Prices are per person):
* AED 49: choose from 9 dishes
* AED 59: choose from 18 dishes
* AED 79 choose from 27 dishes

Unlimited food and drinks: AED 139

📍 Lavash at J3 Mall in Jumeirah
🕗 8 AM to 3:30 PM daily

Foodie tip: Servings are huge! It’s best to go with friends, so you can order and share different dishes.

Tag your breakfast buddies!
